meta_title: Removals Uckfield | Local Wealden Movers | Mark Ratcliffe
meta_description: Uckfield removals from our Lower Dicker depot. BAR-registered, premium pad-wrap, guaranteed move date. Serving Wealden since 1982.
intro_paragraph: Mark Ratcliffe Moving has covered Uckfield and the surrounding Wealden villages from our Lower Dicker depot since 1982. The A22 puts us within twenty-five minutes of Uckfield High Street, and our crews regularly work Buxted, Maresfield and Framfield as part of our daily rounds. We are a BAR-registered family business that pad-wraps every piece of furniture and guarantees your move date.

sections.body_html:
Mark Ratcliffe Moving has covered Uckfield and the surrounding Wealden villages from our Lower Dicker depot since 1982. The A22 puts us within twenty-five minutes of Uckfield High Street, and our crews regularly work Buxted, Maresfield and Framfield as part of our daily rounds. We are a BAR-registered family business that pad-wraps every piece of furniture and guarantees your move date.

  • BAR-registered family business — 40+ years moving Sussex households
  • Premium pad-wrap protection on every item
  • Guaranteed move date once your 20% deposit is received
  • No charge for postponements, key waits or cancellations
  • Trained, uniformed crews in liveried vans

sections.heading: The Uckfield removal services we offer
sections.body_html:
The Uckfield removal services we offer

Full house removals

Single rooms, full houses, country estates. We pad-wrap, label, transport and place every item in your new home.

Learn more →

Man and van Uckfield

Smaller, budget-friendly moves. Same BAR-trained crew, smaller vehicle, hourly rate.

Learn more →

Storage near Uckfield

Individual steel Prestige rooms at our Lower Dicker depot. CCTV, alarmed access, monthly billing.

Learn more →

International from Uckfield

Specialist UK to Thailand and worldwide door-to-door relocation service from your Uckfield home.

Learn more →

Packing services

Full or fragile-only packing — our premium pad-wrap method is what separates a Mark Ratcliffe move from a generic remover.

Learn more →

Office & commercial

Out-of-hours business moves with minimal downtime. IT-equipment handling and document storage.

Learn more →

sections.heading: Why local matters when you choose a Uckfield removal company
sections.body_html:
Why local matters when you choose a Uckfield removal company

Choosing a local removal firm for your Uckfield move is not just about convenience — it is about cost, reliability and routing knowledge. From our Lower Dicker depot, our crews reach Uckfield via the A22 corridor, and they know the area's quirks: where parking is tight, which streets have low bridges, where the parking-suspension applications need to go and what time the school-run traffic builds up. National movers pricing in a Uckfield job have to factor in the long empty leg back to their yard; we do not, so our quotes are typically more competitive for Uckfield addresses.

We are also part of the local community. You will recognise our vans on the A22 corridor, you may have seen them at Uckfield High Street, the Bridge Cottage and the Sussex Weald, and our family has been part of Sussex life for over forty years. Many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours we moved years earlier.

We cover Buxted, Maresfield, Framfield, Ridgewood and Manor Park as part of our standard Uckfield service area, with no extra travel charges within these districts.

sections.heading: How we protect your possessions
sections.body_html:
How we protect your possessions

Every Uckfield move uses our signature pad-wrap process. Each piece of furniture is individually wrapped in a thick quilted blanket inside your home, taped, labelled, then carried out — and only unwrapped once it is placed in its final position in your new property. This is the same method used by high-end international movers, and it is why our breakage rate is a fraction of the industry average.

sections.heading: A recent Uckfield move
sections.body_html:
A recent Uckfield move

A move from Uckfield to the coast

Empty-nesters in Uckfield wanted to move to a sea-view flat at Eastbourne. We surveyed in Uckfield, packed and pad-wrapped on the Thursday, loaded and shipped on the Friday — and stored a few items at Lower Dicker until the new flat was ready a fortnight later.

sections.heading: What sets us apart from generic national movers
sections.body_html:
What sets us apart from generic national movers

Generic national removal firms quote your move based on volume and postcode distance — but they cover everywhere, so they know nowhere. They will not know the parking restrictions on your street, the tight stairwell in the older terraces, or the school-run window that determines whether a 7.5-tonne lorry can manoeuvre at 8.30am. We do. We are also accountable locally — many of our customers are repeat clients or referrals from neighbours, so the move-day experience matters to us in a way that a national chain simply cannot replicate. And finally, on price: our quotes typically beat the nationals on local moves because we are not pricing in the empty leg back to a Midlands depot.

sections.heading: What to expect on move day with us
sections.body_html:
What to expect on move day with us

Our crews follow the same routine on every move, regardless of property size: arrive 8.00–8.30am, walk the rooms with you, lay floor protection, pad-wrap furniture in the room before carrying out, load in a planned sequence, walk through the empty house with you before locking up, head to the new address, unload in reverse order placing furniture in the right room, unwrap and place each item, beds reassembled, final walk-through, sign-off. The whole process for a typical 3-bedroom local move runs 8am to 3-4pm.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.body_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

How far is Uckfield from your depot?

Lower Dicker to Uckfield High Street is about 22 minutes via the A22. We do not charge a separate mileage premium for Uckfield — it is part of our standard service area.

Can you store furniture between an Uckfield sale and a coast purchase?

Yes. Many of our Uckfield-to-coast (and coast-to-Uckfield) customers use our Prestige steel storage rooms to bridge a few-week gap between completion dates.

Do you cover the Wealden villages outside Uckfield town?

Buxted, Maresfield, Framfield, High Hurstwood, Five Ash Down, Crowborough and Mayfield are all in our weekly routing. Ask us about your specific village.
